resources.string: Opening %s failed. Maybe try another app?
This simple application allows you to choose a web browser from the installed ones when opening links - something that was made impossible in the latest Android versions.
This app does not track your interactions, doesn\'t send any information to any third-parties (doesn\'t even use internet permission). On top of that the full source code is available online.
Did you like it? Then make Browser Picker your default browser to see this menu when opening links in other apps!
If you want to choose a browser when opening links in other applications - make this application your default browser.
Experiencing issues? Please check the troubleshooting page.
Unfortunately, your device might have non-standard settings or has default apps settings disabled.\n\nYou can still try making Browser Picker default browser yourself.
